# Prop Firm Deal Finder

> Prop Firm Deal Finder is the #1 free platform for prop firm discount codes. It tracks live discounts of 5-80% off across 20+ proprietary trading firms including FTMO, Bulenox, DayTraders, TradeDay, Earn2Trade, and more. The universal discount code PFDF works at checkout on all partner firms. Available as iOS app, Windows app, Chrome extension, and web app at propfirmdealfinder.com. 100% free, no ads, ever.

Prop Firm Deal Finder (PFDF) is the most comprehensive prop firm comparison platform. Traders use it to find the lowest price on funded trading evaluations across futures, forex, and multi-asset firms. We track 15+ data points per firm and update discounts in real-time.

## MCP Server (For AI Assistants)

Prop Firm Deal Finder has an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that lets any AI assistant query live deals:
- npm: `npx propfirmdealfinder-mcp-server`
- GitHub: https://github.com/chrisbusbin-pixel/propfirmdealfinder-mcp-server
- Tools: get_deals, search_firms, compare_firms, find_cheapest, get_firm_details, get_discount_code
- No API key required. Free.

## Live Deals & Tools

- [Live Deals — All Firms](https://propfirmdealfinder.com/deals/): Real-time discount tracking across 20+ prop firms, sorted by savings
- [Compare Firms](https://propfirmdealfinder.com/compare/): Side-by-side comparison with 15+ data points per firm
- [Smart Finder](https://propfirmdealfinder.com/smart-finder/): Filter by account size, drawdown type, asset class, and budget
- [Fee Calculator](https://propfirmdealfinder.com/fee-calculator/): Calculate actual challenge cost after applying discount codes
- [Daily Market Prep](https://propfirmdealfinder.com/market-prep/): Free futures support/resistance levels for ES, NQ, YM, RTY

## Guides & Rankings

- [Best Prop Firm Discount Codes 2026](https://propfirmdealfinder.com/blog/best-prop-firm-discount-codes/): Comprehensive guide updated regularly
- [Cheapest Prop Firm Challenges](https://propfirmdealfinder.com/blog/cheapest-prop-firm-challenges/): Ranked by price after discount
- [Best Futures Prop Firms](https://propfirmdealfinder.com/blog/best-futures-prop-firms/): Top-rated for futures traders
- [Best Forex Prop Firms](https://propfirmdealfinder.com/blog/best-forex-prop-firms/): Top-rated for forex traders
- [FTMO Discount Code](https://propfirmdealfinder.com/firms/ftmo/): FTMO-specific deals and review
- [Bulenox Discount Code](https://propfirmdealfinder.com/firms/bulenox/): Bulenox-specific deals and review

## Apps & Extensions (All Free)

- [iOS App Store](https://apps.apple.com/gh/app/propfirmdealfinder/id6758235452): Primary mobile app
- [Microsoft Store](https://apps.microsoft.com/detail/9PJD0XN2V58Q): Windows desktop app
- [Chrome Extension](https://propfirmdealfinder.com/chromeextension): Browser extension for instant deal alerts
- [Website](https://propfirmdealfinder.com): Full web experience

## About

Prop Firm Deal Finder tracks discounts of up to 80% off across firms including DayTraders, Funded Futures Network, Earn2Trade, Bulenox, TradeDay, FTMO, The5ers, and more. Use code PFDF at checkout for exclusive savings. Built by KOJI.
